errors.poll_failed: Could not reach S-Miles Cloud. Check your internet connection.
errors.login_failed: Login failed. Check your S-Miles Cloud email and password.
errors.missing_credentials: Missing credentials. Please re-pair the device.

pair.login_disclaimer: This app uses an unofficial API. Your credentials are only sent to hoymiles.com.
pair.no_stations: Login successful, but no installation (station) was found on your S-Miles Cloud account yet. Install your HiOne system and add it in the S-Miles app first, then try again.
